name: Salmon Delight
recipeInstructions:
Servings: 4
1. Beat the egg and milk together in a large bowl.
2. Add the soft bread crumbs to the egg mixture.
3. Flake the salmon, removing the skin and bones, and add it to the egg and bread crumb mixture.
4. Stir in the grated cheddar cheese and seasonings (celery salt, garlic powder).
5. Transfer the mixture into a greased casserole dish.
6. Sprinkle the buttered bread crumbs on top of the salmon mixture.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F for 35 minutes.
8. Serve plain or with your favorite tomato or egg sauce.
